description: This is for the emergency stabilization of an existing worship space / venue that was damaged by Hurricane Ida. Work was already underway to restore the building; new piers, sills and joists were installed. The rear was under construction at the time of the storm and partially collapsed in the high winds. Now, additional structural repair is needed to right the side walls before the restoration can be completed. No end use or occupancy has been determined at this time.
2 Office Containers shall be placed on property address above (1) 20' office container & (1) 40' office container with parking lot & (1) handicap space.- Helping Hands Credit Union

description: MARINA - 2 Electric Poles AND private boat docks w/ a small flat deck (28x40) with 3 adjacent back in slips

The renovation to a two story building at 1434 N. Rampart Street, New Orleans . The previous use of the building was believe to be a automotive upholstery shop, and then later becoming a medical center. The building has been vacant for 20 years and the proposed use would be a Art studio and Gallery, with an office on the ground floor. The building is located in the Historic Marigny/Treme/Bywater Commercial Districts/HMC-2, which permits the use of an Art Studio, Gallery, and Office under section 10.2.A in the New Orleans Comprehensive Zoning Ordinance.
